CampaignPatchRequestSchema.title: CampaignPatchRequestSchema
CampaignPatchRequestSchema.description:
Defines the fields that can be patched and accepts any subset of the fields.
Skips advanced validation, it will be handled in PATCH endpoint:
    see https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/tutorial/body-updates/#partial-updates-with-patch

PublicCampaignResponseSchema.title: PublicCampaignResponseSchema
PublicCampaignResponseSchema.description: Contains only fields allowed to be seen by the public, e.g. no channel_connection_id.
